title: bidens somaliensis
intro: Bidens somaliensis is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae, native to the Horn of Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bidens somaliensis include its ability to treat various ailments such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Bidens somaliensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
